title: Baked Ukrainian Pasta
description: A warm and comforting Ukrainian-inspired pasta dish baked to perfection. This hearty dish combines the flavors of Ukraine with the simplicity of baked pasta.

ingredients.name: Pasta
ingredients.notes: Choose a hearty pasta shape like pappardelle or fettuccine

ingredients.name: Ground beef
ingredients.notes: Make sure to cook the ground beef to an internal temperature of 160°F (71°C)

instructions: Cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, cook the ground beef over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the onion, garlic, and mushrooms to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the beef broth, tomato paste, and dried dill. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta, meat mixture, and salt and pepper to taste. Mix well to combine.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with additional grated cheese if desired.
Bake the pasta in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the pasta is heated through.
